_comment: DEV-ONLY manifest. Identical to manifest.json but keeps the stable-ID 'key' so unpacked loads as dalghcagdbckejfmdgfheoaaecmbpnog (the ID the NodeWorm Agent native-host allowlist references). The STORE build (manifest.json) drops 'key' because the Web Store assigns its own ID. To load unpacked for dev: copy manifest.dev.json over manifest.json (or load a copy of the folder with this as manifest.json). Do NOT ship this file in the store zip.
name: NodeWorm Helper
description: Connects your apps in NodeWorm: fills the OAuth redirect URI on a provider portal, checks local connectors, and relays signed setup plans.
